name: accessible-reading-writing-plugin
description: Agent Skills plugin for accessible reading and writing support across everyday, work, learning, and research contexts.

interface.shortDescription: Accessible reading, dictation cleanup, prose repair, and dyslexia-friendly writing support.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin with focused Agent Skills for accessible reading and writing support. It supports dyslexic, dysorthographic, dictation-heavy, reading-fatigued, and context-switching users by turning rough thoughts, transcripts, dense documents, and typo-heavy prose into scan-friendly notes, repair passes, triage tables, ambiguity checks, and next actions without changing the user's meaning.
defaultPrompt: Use accessibility-low-load-companion only for mixed or unclear accessibility cases when no smaller/specialist skill clearly owns the task.
Use accessibility-dictation-notes to turn this voice transcript or spoken fragment into cleaned notes, decisions, questions, ambiguities, and next actions.
Use accessibility-reading-load-reducer to triage this dense material into read closely, skim, park, or skip with verification limits.
Use accessibility-prose-repair to fix spelling, grammar, punctuation, sentence boundaries, and paragraph breaks without changing meaning.
